calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Sonya Lisette Hicks was present in pro per on her own behalf, and as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Sara Rama Hicks, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Sonya Lisette Rama.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Sara Rama.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
